understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level to win; avoid spike tiles `u`/`v` which cause instant failure. Progress through multiple levels until all are completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only via MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT; after each horizontal move, the player automatically falls in the current gravity direction (DOWN toward lower y, UP toward higher y) until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks `x` at a target position (does not advance moving platform timers). UNDO reverts the previous action. Hazards end the run immediately; each level grants 2 attempts with 50 turns each.
